wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Unrest Site.png}} {{E|Unrest Site|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. This event only appears if the player's HP is at or below 70% of their Max HP. == Options == {{Frame|Rest Anyways}} {{TS|positive||Heal to full HP.}} {{TS|negative||Receive {{C|Poor Sleep||2}} (curse).}}
{{Frame|Kill the Trees}} {{TS|negative||Lose 8 Max HP.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} == Dialogue ==
You find a secluded Rest Site and start a fire to get some rest. Or so you thought. Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but sideways towards a grove of oil-seeping trees. Should you try resting anyways?
{{Frame|Rest Anyways}}
All this adventuring has left you exhausted, and despite the oddities, you decide to sleep. You toss and turn as the fire roars and crackles through the night. The disgusting trees give off a wretched scent from their pitch-black sap. You wake up, recovered, but not replenished.
{{Frame|Kill the Trees}}
These trees are clearly malicious so you decide to get rid of them. Days later, you're covered in ash and oily goop. A massive flock of little byrd spirits rise from the slain trees and drop a small box at your feet. "Thank you for freeing us from those trees... cheep cheep!" You should really sleep more.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
